prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约7775→6857→7516→9429→10559，整体呈后移趋势，2024年新高考改革后位次明显后移，2025年基准约10559名，近两年累计后移约30 43名；本省理科组计划2021–2022年均为17人，2023年增至20人，2024年增至24人，2025年增至25人；2026年计划大幅扩招至58人，较2025年增长132%， 为近年最大幅度扩招，显著增加录取机会。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年65位持续上升至2026年52位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力 和认可度增强；2023年曾出现偏负面学校管理事件，但近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；无投档断档记录；食品科学与工程A+、轻工技术与工程A+，两个A+学科在全国处于顶尖水平，与该校食品、轻化等招生专业直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 江南大学位于江苏无锡，属跨省招生；该校在甘肃招生占比极小（约0.5%– 0.7%），对本地考生而言属于较远距离的东部院校选择；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，江南大学在计算机、自动化、智能制造等方向均有招生；甘肃省2026年物理类考生约14.6万 人（较2025年增长约20%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招132%是最大利好因素，但甘肃省物理类考生增加约20%、 学校软科排名持续上升及211层次吸引力增强，部分抵消扩招带来的位次后移效应。预计2026年最低位次约19072名，区间18572–19572名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 7775 → 6857 → 7516 → 9429 → 10559, showing an overall backward trend. After the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward. The 2025 baseline is about 10559, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3043 places over the past two years. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 17 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 20 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 25 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 58, an increase of 132% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, showing continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a somewhat negative school management incident, but recent reputation has been stable with no obvious negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate short video exposure. No record of admission gaps. Food Science and Engineering is A+, and Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, both top-tier nationally, directly corresponding to the university's food and light chemical majors, strongly attracting students in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, and recruits across provinces. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is very small (about 0.5%–0.7%), making it a relatively distant eastern university choice for local students. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular socially. Jiangnan University offers programs in Computer Science, Automation, and Intelligent Manufacturing. In 2026, Gansu Province has about 146,000 physics category examinees (an increase of about 20% from 2025), and the expanded candidate pool intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings and the significant 132% enrollment expansion in 2026 as the biggest positive factor, but the increase of about 20% in Gansu physics category examinees, the rising Soft Science ranking, and the enhanced attractiveness of the 211 level partially offset the ranking backward effect from expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 19072, with a range of 18572–19572.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, with a significant expansion to 58 students and a ranking range of about 18572–19572, it is recommended that candidates with a ranking around 19000 focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, an A+ flagship, and Intelligent Manufacturing and other new engineering fields). Those with rankings better than 18500 can aim for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Automation, while candidates with rankings below 19500 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. Food Science and Engineering is Jiangnan University's A+ flagship discipline, offering outstanding value for money and deserves special attention.
